name: Eventzella - Audit Report AI Recommendation Email

parameters.jsCode: const stdout = String($json.stdout || '').trim(); if (!stdout) { throw new Error('Audit reader script returned empty stdout'); } let parsed; try { parsed = JSON.parse(stdout); } catch (e) { throw new Error('Invalid JSON from audit reader: ' + stdout.slice(0, 500)); } if (!parsed.ok) { throw new Error(parsed.error || 'Audit reader returned ok=false'); } const reportPath = String(parsed.report_path || '').replace(/\\/g, '/'); if (!reportPath) throw new Error('Missing report_path from reader output'); const fallbackUrl = 'file:///' + reportPath; return [{ json: { ...parsed, report_path: reportPath, run_at_utc: new Date().toISOString(), download_url: String($env.REPORT_AUDIT_DOWNLOAD_URL || fallbackUrl), recipient_email: String($env.MANAGEMENT_EMAIL || '') } }];

const base = $json; const prompt = `Tu es un consultant senior BI et gouvernance data.

Analyse cet extrait de rapport d'audit EventZella puis donne des recommandations actionnables.

Contraintes de sortie: JSON strict uniquement au format:
{
  "executive_summary": "...",
  "top_findings": ["...","...","..."],
  "recommendations_30_days": ["...","..."],
  "recommendations_90_days": ["...","..."],
  "risk_level": "Low|Medium|High"
}

Extrait du rapport:
${base.content_excerpt}`; return [{ json: { ...base, ai_prompt: prompt } }];

const base = $('Build AI Prompt').first().json; const aiRaw = $('Call AI Agent').first().json || {}; const rawText = String(aiRaw.reply || aiRaw.output || aiRaw.text || aiRaw.content || aiRaw.error || '').trim(); let parsed = null; try { const m = rawText.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); if (m) parsed = JSON.parse(m[0]); } catch (e) { parsed = null; } if (!parsed) { parsed = { executive_summary: rawText || 'AI response not structured.', top_findings: [], recommendations_30_days: [], recommendations_90_days: [], risk_level: 'Medium' }; } const toList = (arr) => Array.isArray(arr) && arr.length ? arr.map((x) => `
  • ${String(x)}
    • `).join('') : '
  • No item provided.
    • '; const risk = String(parsed.risk_level || 'Medium'); const riskColor = risk === 'High' ? '#b71c1c' : risk === 'Low' ? '#1b5e20' : '#ef6c00'; const subject = `EventZella Audit AI Recommendations - ${base.file_name}`; const html = `${subject}

    Audit Report - AI Recommendations

    File: ${base.file_name}

    Execution time (UTC): ${base.run_at_utc}

    Risk level: ${risk}

    Executive Summary

    ${String(parsed.executive_summary || '').replace(/\n/g, '
    ')}

    Top Findings

      ${toList(parsed.top_findings)}

    Recommendations (30 days)

      ${toList(parsed.recommendations_30_days)}

    Recommendations (90 days)

      ${toList(parsed.recommendations_90_days)}
    Download Full Audit Report

    The full report is also attached in this email for details.

    `; return [{ json: { ...base, ai_raw_text: rawText, ai_structured: parsed, email_subject: subject, email_html: html } }];
